title: UK AI data centers could be given water priority during heatwaves and hosepipe bans as trade body warns that usage hasn’t been factored into AI growth zone projections
summary: Therefore, there may be little that UK water companies can do to reduce the water usage of data centers, particularly during heatwaves - meaning that restrictions on non-essential water use (such as hosepipe bans) will apply only to people.
